body_transformation: Slowpoke's plump body now wears a cracked, magma-weathered hide with deep crimson and burnt orange hues, its smooth skin replaced by jagged fissures filled with molten gold. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame, its spiral shape preserved but now radiating heat. Large round eyes retain their black pupils but glow faintly with ember light, while the pointed ears develop a subtle ember-scaled texture. Short stubby legs are encased in heat-resistant, cracked obsidian plates that shimmer with amber reflections.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten crimson flame with glowing amber embers and heat-haze distortion.
